| 7                | 78     | Well-targeted emotional language; visual complements resilience theme; copy effectively evokes calm and strategy amidst turbulence. Heuristic calibration high. |
| 8                | 72     | Strong focus on emotional triggers; visual and copy aligned, creating insightful framing; heuristics reflect good sharpness but could deepen emotional insight.  |

| 15               | 70     | Optimistic visual and forward-thinking copy; encourages resilience; heuristics suggest moderate sharpness, with some emotional appeal.                |
